text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after a training session with Manhattan
Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would it be all right if we trained for a little
longer?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There are so many of them today... I think I'll be
able to get some good experience...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It sounds like she's seeing something that I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're calling me over... Could I... go join
them?
choice_data_list: It's getting late. How about another time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe runs around the track at night,
alone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But strangely enough, I feel like I can hear the
footsteps of other runners... And there's a sense
of whimsy to every single one.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll let them know we'll have to do this another
time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe declines the unseen entities'
offer, and we finish training for the day.
